name: Michal's Margaritas
directions: Put limeade into a blender container.
fill empty can with Tequila and add to blender.
fill can 1/3 full with Triple Sec.
add lime juice.
turn on blender and gradually add ice cubes,1-2 at a time, allowing the mixture to become slushy before adding more.
continue to add cubes until the entire blender container is full of Margarita.
serve in chilled glasses, rimmed with coarse, salt, if desired.

name: Mouthwatering Margaritas
directions: Process first 7 ingredients together in a blender until smooth.
Gradually add ice to blender and process until smooth.
Rub lime wedges on glass rims and spin each glass rim in salt.
Pour margaritas into salted glassses.
Note: I usually make these ahead and put in the freezer.
Just remove about 5 minutes before serving and stir.

name: Pitcher of Frozen Margarita's
directions: Add first 5 ingredients to a blender and liquify.
Add extra water if needed to keep blender moving.
Dip rims of glasses in lime juice then salt.
Place a lime wedge on glass rim.
Serve.

name: Mango Margaritas
directions: Fill blender with ice.
Add all other ingredients.
Blend until smooth (about 2 minutes).
Dip rim of glass in water or mango nectar; then dip in salt.
Pour margarita into glass and serve.

name: Drunken Orange Julius
directions: Blend above in Blender with 8 ice cubes.
Add your liquor.
They are refreshing any time.

name: Annie's Pina Colada
directions: Place all ingredients except pineapple chunk and cherry, with crushed ice in blender; Blend until smooth; Pour into 13 oz glass; Garnish with pineapple chunk and cherry.

name: Brewers Nun
directions: Pour all ingredients, except cherries, into 18 oz wine glass.
Fill with ice and stir well.
Garnish with cherries.

name: Ultimate Blue Frozen Margarita
directions: Put ice in the blender.
Then put the remaining ingredients, in the order listed, over the ice.
Blend on high for a few seconds.
Pour into margarita glasses.
Serve immediately.

name: Merry Margaritas
directions: Add the first 5 ingredients to the container of a blender.
Fill blender with ice to 5-cup level, and process until smooth.
Serve immediately.

name: Pinkie's Peachy Daiquiri
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender.
Blend until smooth.
Enjoy out by the pool or beach!
(All ingredients approximate.  You may substitute fruit as you wish.).

name: Rosie's Pina Coladas
directions: Place all ingredients in blender and blend until ice crushed.
Pour into glasses and add a dash of grenadine to each.
Garnish with pineapple slices and marischino cherries.
Add more ice if you prefer a more icy slushy drink.
NOTE:  To make ahead, blend all ingredients and place in freezer.  When ready to serve, just quickly blend again.

name: Strawberry Daze Cocktail
directions: Blend all ingredients until smooth.

name: Voodoo Cure Cocktail
directions: Blend all ingredients until smooth and serve over ice.

name: Creamy Margaritas
directions: In a blender combine sherbet, evaporated milk, ice cubes and tequila (if using) and blend until smooth.
Run a slice of lime around rim of glass, dip into course salt.
Pour Margaritas into glasses and serve with fresh lime slice.
Serves 4.

name: Coconut Colada
directions: Add captain morgan parrot bay coconut rum, milk, pineapple juice in a blender.
Blend 10-15 seconds and pour into speciality glass.
Garnish with pineapple spear.

name: Pomegranate Margaritas
directions: Pour sugar and water into saucepan; set saucepan over medium heat;  stirring until sugar dissolves.
Let cool.
In a blender, mix the sugar syrup, juices, tequila, liquor, and ice cubes and puree until slushy.
Pour into salt rimmed glasses and enjoy!

name: Peach Surprise Cocktail
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender, blend well.

name: Blended Blue Hawaiian
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender. Blend until smooth.

name: Mixed Berry Margarita
directions: In the jar of a blender, combine ice cubes, berries, tequila, Cointreau, orange juice, soda, sparkling mineral water, agave nectar and lime juice; process until smooth and well blended.
Pour margarita in a large pitcher and transfer to the refrigerator for 2 hours or until chilled. Yields 8 cups.
